headline: Why INDS Self-Storage and Warehouse Blend Offers Steadier Dividends Than Pure Logistics Plays
summary: Pacer Industrial Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:INDS) targets income investors seeking exposure to e-commerce warehouses, with a 30-day SEC yield near 3.47% and quarterly distributions stretching back to May 2018. The fund tracks the Solactive GPR Industrial Real Estate Index at an expense ratio of 0.49%. The core question is whether that distribution reflects durable industrial ... Why INDS Self-Storage and Warehouse Blend Offers Steadier Dividends Than Pure Logistics Plays
